params.name: Dream Stele
params.description:
On Jul 15, 1401 BC, Tuthmosis IV ordered to erect the Sphinx Stele.
The Sphinx Stele is also known as the Dream Stele because it tells the story of the young Prince Tuthmosis who fell asleep near the Great Sphinx of Giza and dreamt that the Sphinx promised him the throne of Egypt in return for Tuthmosis clearing the sand away from around it. Tuthmosis did as he was instructed and went on to become the pharaoh Tuthmosis IV. In gratitude, he promoted Re-Horemakhet above Amun-Re, dedicated a tem …
